runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 7th over 340m at this track beaten 12 lengths (20.68) behind Katie Keeping in a Grade 5 on March 25. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

runners.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when she finished 4th over 340m at this track beaten 6 lengths (20.58) behind Jacobite Knife in a Grade 5 on April 4. Looks a solid contender.
